title: Credential
description: A credential in the Life Engine canonical data model.

issuer.description: The authority that issued the credential (e.g. google.com, github.com, au.gov)

issued_date.description: Date the credential was issued in ISO 8601 format

expiry_date.description: Expiration date in ISO 8601 format (null for non-expiring credentials)

claims.description: Type-specific data. The shape depends on the credential type.

source.description: Identifier of the connector or plugin that produced this record

source_id.description: The record's original ID in the source system

extensions.description: Plugin-specific extension data, namespaced by plugin ID (reverse-domain format)
